decision.next_codex_prompt: 继续实施并一次性交付可核验证据：1) 在 GitHub 明确 hermes-agent 目标仓库（给出仓库 URL 与版本/分支）；2) 将源码压缩包下载到 `MyWorkSpace/TargetProjects` 并完成解压（给出压缩包路径、解压目录路径、目录清单关键项）；3) 在 `docs/daily-upgrade/0402` 下分别产出 Butler `flow`/`chat`/`campaign` 的两类文档（详细参考学习 + 启发式），共 6 份，文件名清晰可区分；4) 输出最小验收清单：每个文件路径、下载来源、每个产品至少 3 条关键对照点；5) 若任一步骤失败，给出失败命令、错误摘要与补救后结果。

phase_plan.title: Plan
phase_plan.objective: Produce or repair the concrete implementation plan, identify files/tests, and leave the repo ready for execution.
phase_plan.done_when: A concrete implementation plan is ready and the next code/test targets are clear.

phase_plan.title: Implement
phase_plan.objective: Implement the plan, update code/tests/docs as needed, and make the repository materially closer to done.
phase_plan.done_when: The implementation is materially advanced and ready for review or targeted follow-up.

phase_plan.title: Review
phase_plan.objective: Review the latest implementation, run verification, fix real issues you find, then summarize residual risks.
phase_plan.done_when: Verification is acceptable and the work is ready to conclude.
